scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @devbrain/db && npm run build --workspace @devbrain/brain-core && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @devbrain/api" "npm run dev --workspace @devbrain/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @devbrain/db && npm run build --workspace @devbrain/brain-core && npm run dev --workspace @devbrain/api
scripts.cli: npm run build --workspace @devbrain/db && npm run build --workspace @devbrain/brain-core && npm run dev --workspace @devbrain/cli --
